这个金手指的写法个人觉得挺不错的。就是或许跟女主们的互动可以多一点？","text_exts":[{"e":20,"s":16,"text":"刀剑神域","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%88%80%E5%89%91%E7%A5%9E%E5%9F%9F&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317740259393816E92D%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227231442098842452748%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227181048011420601359%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%88%80%E5%89%91%E7%A5%9E%E5%9F%9F%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1683701465,"group_id":"7181048011420601359","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N//yaxszS/b7p3zEQ4jt+KBAXGPKXVeAuGQy3LlAfIKW","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776614448&x-signature=77B3F2V9HxLK4vsnQuBSstH5PAo%3D","user_id":"4442469972841107","user_name":"天不生XX后宫如长夜"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4442469972841107","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7181048011420601359","book_info":{"abstract":"（分身流）＋（综漫流）＋（多女主）
白烨穿越了，没有系统，没有老爷爷。
好在他穿越的世界不止一个，而是同时穿越了无数的世界。
鬼灭白烨：“屑老板？出来晒晒太阳啦，长时间不接触阳光对身体不好哦。”
英灵白烨：“吾等降临，便是人类群星闪耀之时。”
暴龙兽白烨：“小狗兽，你以后千万不要变成那个样子（指着圣龙兽的图片）”。
路人白烨：“6”
宝可梦世界、弑神者世界、奥特曼世界、游戏人生世界......
所有白烨：“我都是靠着自己努力，才有如今的成就。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/ca53456d8a5c885332c663566e11a25a","author":"跳跳虎爱吃蜂蜜","author_id":"","book_id":"7181048011420601359","book_name":"综漫：外挂竟是我自己","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#a85878","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":367,"name":"奥特同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=367&name=奥特同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":371,"name":"神奇宝贝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=371&name=神奇宝贝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":465,"name":"综漫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=465&name=综漫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7181051354796786233","read_count":"12177","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1184547"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.8","serial_count":"584","tags":"动漫衍生,穿越,二次元,奥特同人,神奇宝贝,综漫,同人,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/32e8249fe180d7373aee092ec4ead50c~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779209939&x-signature=pw95RWo2PvFRevXPLmTd2uMt3lg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4353711647018783","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read
